title: POV: You Pass Your Funded Account Then GDP Drops 🔴
description: POV: You finally pass your funded account… then GDP week hits and wipes you out. Here's the one thing the R2F Trading system checks before every major news release. Don't skip this. #ICTTrading #FundedTrader #SmartMoneyConcepts #OrderBlocks #FairValueGap #r2ftrading
script: You just passed your funded account. GDP drops tomorrow. You have no idea what's coming. You take a trade. Looks clean. Price sweeps liquidity — you think it's your entry. GDP prints. Volatile. Price blows through your stop. Account flagged. Gone. The mistake? You ignored the fair value gap sitting right above price. Smart money already knew. The R2F Trading system has one rule before GDP week: no trades inside an unmitigated FVG. Ever. Wait 15 minutes after the release. Let price mitigate. Then find your order block entry. Clean. Safe. Don't blow your funded account on GDP week. Follow R2F Trading. New setups every day at r2ftrading.com.
